enders_delight.title: Cook an Enderman Steak (Ender's Delight — not End's Delight — from Enderman kills)

shulker_soup.title: Craft Shulker Soup (Ender's Delight — uses shulker shells + End materials)

subtitle.text: Two mods. Two food systems. One dimension. Eat everything.

description: NOTE: Two different mods, both about End food.
End's Delight (ends_delight:) — Ender Dragon food chain.
Ender's Delight (endersdelight:) — Enderman and Shulker food chain.
They are compatible and separate systems.
Enderman Steak comes from Enderman kills, processed in a smoker.
Endermen are abundant. The steak gives moderate saturation.
Shulker Soup uses Shulker Shells — the same drops you need for Shulker Boxes.
Prioritize boxes. The soup is secondary.
But cook it at least once.
Everything in this dimension is edible.
You have eaten across every biome in the game now.
